personal.name: TARUN YADAV
personal.title: AI Engineer | ML Systems | GenAI
personal.tagline: Building intelligent systems that feel like magic

featuredProjects.title: Barista AI
featuredProjects.subtitle: Conversational Barista Assistant
featuredProjects.description: An intelligent AI barista built on a Hugging Face Space that helps users craft their perfect coffee order using natural language. Features multi-turn conversation, drink customization, and GenAI-powered recommendations.

featuredProjects.title: Ragbot Merlin
featuredProjects.subtitle: RAG-Powered Knowledge Assistant
featuredProjects.description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that ingests documents and answers questions with cited sources. Built with LangChain, vector embeddings, and a sleek Gradio interface.

featuredProjects.title: Financial LLM Copilot
featuredProjects.subtitle: AI-Powered Financial Analysis
featuredProjects.description: A specialized LLM copilot for financial analysis. Ask complex financial questions, get market insights, and perform quantitative analysis using a domain-fine-tuned language model.

featuredProjects.title: Stock Prediction Platform
featuredProjects.subtitle: ML-Driven Market Forecasting
featuredProjects.description: A full-featured stock prediction platform leveraging ML models for time-series forecasting. Integrates live market data, LSTM networks, and interactive charts for trading insights.

aiMlProjects.title: Option Pricing Engine
aiMlProjects.subtitle: Quantitative Derivatives Calculator
aiMlProjects.description: A production-grade option pricing web app implementing Black-Scholes, Binomial Trees, and Monte Carlo simulation for derivatives valuation. Real-time Greeks calculation and risk visualization.

aiMlProjects.title: AI-Powered NIDS
aiMlProjects.subtitle: Network Intrusion Detection System
aiMlProjects.description: Real-time ML-based Network Intrusion Detection System with observability. Uses ensemble ML models to classify network traffic, detect anomalies, and visualize security events on a live dashboard.

aiMlProjects.title: Portfolio Optimization
aiMlProjects.subtitle: Modern Portfolio Theory Engine
aiMlProjects.description: Python-based portfolio optimization using Modern Portfolio Theory (MPT). Efficient frontier visualization, Sharpe ratio maximization, and multi-asset allocation strategies.

aiMlProjects.title: Credit Risk Analysis
aiMlProjects.subtitle: ML-Based Loan Default Prediction
aiMlProjects.description: End-to-end credit risk analysis pipeline using gradient boosting and logistic regression. Includes feature engineering, model explainability (SHAP), and a risk scoring dashboard.

backendProjects.title: Vendor Performance Analysis
backendProjects.subtitle: Supply Chain Intelligence Platform
backendProjects.description: A comprehensive vendor performance analytics system with automated KPI tracking, anomaly detection, and optimization recommendations for supply chain management.

blogs.excerpt: How multi-agent systems are redefining automation and what it means for engineers building production AI.

blogs.title: Building RAG Systems That Actually Work
blogs.excerpt: Practical lessons from deploying retrieval-augmented generation in production environments.

blogs.title: ML Observability: Beyond Accuracy Metrics
blogs.excerpt: Why drift detection, feature monitoring, and model explainability matter more than your validation score.
